mapper.select: /* AdminPopupMapper.selectPopupDtl */ SELECT POPUP_SEQ AS popupSeq ,POPUP_SJ AS popupSj ,POPUP_URL AS popupUrl ,ATCHFILENO AS atchfileno ,POPUP_WIDTH_LC AS popupWidthLc ,POPUP_HEIGHT_LC AS popupHeightLc ,POPUP_WIDTH AS popupWidth ,POPUP_HEIGHT AS popupHeight ,BGNDE_DE AS bgndeDe ,END_DE AS endDe ,POPUP_ORDR AS popupOrdr ,POPUP_CN AS popupCn ,POPUP_TY AS popupTy ,POPUP_SE AS popupSe ,SITE_CODE AS siteCode ,USE_YN AS useYn ,REG_ID AS regId ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDt ,UPD_ID AS updId ,DATE_FORMAT(UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updDt FROM TB_MAIN_POPUP WHERE POPUP_SEQ = #{popupSeq}
